title: document_manifest_schema
description: Controlled placeholder schema describing processing manifests for OCR document batches. Verified field definitions remain UNKNOWN.

manifest_id.description: Unique identifier for the processing manifest.

creation_timestamp.description: Manifest creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

source_batch_uri.description: Location of the source document batch.

documents.description: Documents included in the processing batch.

processing_parameters.description: Processing configuration applied to this batch.
